3   Find the coeﬃcient of x in the expression:

            (1 + x)0 + (1 + x)1 + (1 + x)2 + (1 + x)3 + · · · + (1 + x)79 + (1 + x)80

    A 80

    B 81

    C 324

    D 628

    E 3240

    F 3321

    G 6480

    H 6642




                                              5

stem.rawText:
Find the coeﬃcient of x in the expression:

            (1 + x)0 + (1 + x)1 + (1 + x)2 + (1 + x)3 + · · · + (1 + x)79 + (1 + x)80

solution.rawText:
The coefficient of x in the expansion of (1 + x)n is n1 = n, so the coefficient of x in this whole
                                                         

expression is
                           0 + 1 + 2 + 3 + · · · + 79 + 80 = 21 × 80 × 81
using the formula for the sum of the first n positive integers, 12 n(n+1). This gives 40×81 = 3240,
so the answer is E.
